Q: 如果無BC又想係英國打工係咪好難?

A:
通常會比working visa一係大公司
D細公司仔都見過有批不過當然會少D

老老實實渣BNO/特區係就係難D不過都唔係無可能
都識得有人搞得掂個visa
以前有同學會係cv度寫明話要working visa
如果間公司都肯in你既話多數即係肯批
唔洗浪費大家時間
大小公司都有 試下無妨

再唔係學其他巴打講
申請左working holiday做住先都未嘗不可
當然之後整唔整到tier 2 working visa就唔敢講
不過起碼都有2年比你係度做下野儲下經驗先

如果做開比較專業行業既朋友其實拎左working holiday visa先，再轉tier 2既機會都幾樂觀，都識幾個朋友都係咁，好似都係做design / I.T.之類 (by 賽麗娜Serena)


Q: 想問下英國見工係咪同香港一樣都係上網報?

A:
如果你話搵工過程其實同香港差唔多
睇你咩工啦
普通黎講大公司既話都係cv cover letter -> online test -> phone in-> assessment centre ( 可以好多round) -> final in
細公司就少幾個步驟咁


Q: 想問下係咪bno 同特區都可以fg 一年tier5 先，唔洗特登要搵肯比tier2 既公司住

A:
你英國畢業定香港想過去？ 唔係英國畢業唔肯定當地申請有無唔同但BNO 隨時可以申請tier 5 重有兩年，特區要抽架，都係兩年。
當地申請可能短d , 我當初因爲公司未令到可以簽visa 既licence 就幫我申請住tier 5 先，得特區又過左抽籤所以係visa 公司幫我係英國申請，但咁就得一年.. 無深究點解。
但全部香港申請過去既都有兩年。 (by 花生哥)

A: 唔遲
雖然有啲係截左
但仲有好多
留學生有優勢 就係唔怕relocation
成個英國既工你都apply得
宜家真係開始send cv都唔會太遲既
好多大公司如果唔係grad scheme既話其實一路都請緊人
以前好多同學都係8/9月先有offer
有D直頭下年1月先有工開
所以唔洗擔心既肯踏出第一步搵工就ok (by 馬壯FN2)

A number of points -

1) Remember to use your BN(O) passport to apply for your UK spouse visa if you have one.

2) You can open an UK bank account with HSBC in Hong Kong before moving to the UK -

https://www.hsbc.com.hk/personal/hsbc-premier/features/premier-overseas-account.html

3) If you got a Hong Kong driving licence by passing a driving test in Hong Kong, you can exchange your Hong Kong driving licence to an UK one without test.

Chrome plugin "Property Tracker"

Property Track
How It Works
Property Track allows you to track price changes on popular property websites, currently supporting the RightMove website. It allows you to see how properties you are searching for have changed in value since first coming on to the market.
The process works by sending the price information to the PropertyTrack server every time you search for a property. If the property has not been viewed before, it will be saved to the database. If it has been viewed before, the previous prices will be downloaded from the server, so that you can see the price trends.
Special Icons
Depending on whether the price has changed or not, you will see a number of different images next to the price.
This means the price has not changed
This means the price has risen since the property was first advertised
This means the price has fallen since the property was first advertised

To view the detail of the price changes, and when the property was first found, move the mouse over the image next to the price and a popup will show you the price changes and dates.

各位大英帝國做緊嘢／將會做嘢嘅巴絲打，歡迎入嚟呢到鳩噏扮下工

Q&A credit to 滑蛋豬仔飯

Q: 如果無BC又想係英國打工係咪好難?

A:
通常會比working visa一係大公司
D細公司仔都見過有批不過當然會少D

老老實實渣BNO/特區係就係難D不過都唔係無可能
都識得有人搞得掂個visa
以前有同學會係cv度寫明話要working visa
如果間公司都肯in你既話多數即係肯批
唔洗浪費大家時間
大小公司都有 試下無妨

再唔係學其他巴打講
申請左working holiday做住先都未嘗不可
當然之後整唔整到tier 2 working visa就唔敢講
不過起碼都有2年比你係度做下野儲下經驗先

如果做開比較專業行業既朋友其實拎左working holiday visa先，再轉tier 2既機會都幾樂觀，都識幾個朋友都係咁，好似都係做design / I.T.之類 (by 賽麗娜Serena)


Q: 想問下英國見工係咪同香港一樣都係上網報?

A:
如果你話搵工過程其實同香港差唔多
睇你咩工啦
普通黎講大公司既話都係cv cover letter -> online test -> phone in-> assessment centre ( 可以好多round) -> final in
細公司就少幾個步驟咁


Q: 想問下係咪bno 同特區都可以fg 一年tier5 先，唔洗特登要搵肯比tier2 既公司住

A:
你英國畢業定香港想過去？ 唔係英國畢業唔肯定當地申請有無唔同但BNO 隨時可以申請tier 5 重有兩年，特區要抽架，都係兩年。
當地申請可能短d , 我當初因爲公司未令到可以簽visa 既licence 就幫我申請住tier 5 先，得特區又過左抽籤所以係visa 公司幫我係英國申請，但咁就得一年.. 無深究點解。
但全部香港申請過去既都有兩年。 (by 花生哥)

A: 唔遲
雖然有啲係截左
但仲有好多
留學生有優勢 就係唔怕relocation
成個英國既工你都apply得
宜家真係開始send cv都唔會太遲既
好多大公司如果唔係grad scheme既話其實一路都請緊人
以前好多同學都係8/9月先有offer
有D直頭下年1月先有工開
所以唔洗擔心既肯踏出第一步搵工就ok (by 馬壯FN2)

我呀哥拎緊Tier2 working visa - a few more points on this -

1) If your brother has British National (Overseas) status, he should renew his BN(O) passport and use it for his application for Indefinite Leave to Remain (永久居留) and British Citizenship. A BN(O) passport holder can register to become a British Citizen using form B(OTA) - this is a cheaper method than naturalisation using form AN.

https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/application-to-register-as-a-british-citizen-form-bota

2) A BN(O) passport holder in the UK with a long term visa can register to vote in all UK elections. Being on the electoral roll helps him to build up his own credit history in the UK.

【網民熱話】灣仔120呎套房床邊煮食 「煮餸食飯都可以瞓喺床上面」

https://hk.finance.appledaily.com/finance/realtime/article/20180610/58302228

facebook群組「香港租屋網」日前貼文放出一個位於灣仔的套房租盤引起網民討論。

放盤題為「灣仔套房120呎7500蚊起」，附有多幅有關套房的相片，相中可見睡床旁邊放置洗衣機，洗衣機機頂設有疑似電子爐，並連鋅盆。隨即引起網民熱話，有名為Wilson Wong網民留言：「好正呀，煮餸食飯都可以瞓喺床上面。」，又有網民Lam King Fui留言：「好方便呀！可以訓係度收衫！」

記者從網站找到一間叫地產代理行的聯絡電話，一個電話再駁另一個電話號碼，最終找到了一名經紀，隨即問她該灣仔套房是否仍有放租盤，她回應：「要check!」，因為該套房是公司另一同事負責，但目前見客中，未能找到同事核實。

4 Acquisition by registration: [F38British overseas territories citizens] etc.
(1)This section applies to any person who is a [F39British overseas territories citizen], [F40a British National (Overseas),] a British Overseas citizen, a British subject under this Act or a British protected person.

(2)A person to whom this section applies shall be entitled, on an application for his registration as a British citizen, to be registered as such a citizen if the following requirements are satisfied in the case of that person, namely—
(a)subject to subsection (3), that he was in the United Kingdom at the beginning of the period of five years ending with the date of the application and that the number of days on which he was absent from the United Kingdom in that period does not exceed 450; and
(b)that the number of days on which he was absent from the United Kingdom in the period of twelve months so ending does not exceed 90; and
(c)that he was not at any time in the period of twelve months so ending subject under the immigration laws to any restriction on the period for which he might remain in the United Kingdom; and
(d)that he was not at any time in the period of five years so ending in the United Kingdom in breach of the immigration laws.

(3)So much of subsection (2)(a) as requires the person in question to have been in the United Kingdom at the beginning of the period there mentioned shall not apply in relation to a person who was settled in the United Kingdom immediately before commencement.

(4)If in the special circumstances of any particular case the Secretary of State thinks fit, he may for the purposes of subsection (2) do all or any of the following things, namely—
(a)treat the person to whom the application relates as fulfilling the requirement specified in subsection (2)(a) or subsection (2)(b), or both, although the number of days on which he was absent from the United Kingdom in the period there mentioned exceeds the number there mentioned;
(b)disregard any such restriction as is mentioned in subsection (2)(c), not being a restriction to which that person was subject on the date of the application;
(c)treat that person as fulfilling the requirement specified in subsection (2)(d) although he was in the United Kingdom in breach of the immigration laws in the period there mentioned.

(5)If, on an application for registration as a British citizen made by a person to whom this section applies, the Secretary of State is satisfied that the applicant has at any time served in service to which this subsection applies, he may, if he thinks fit in the special circumstances of the applicant’s case, cause him to be registered as such a citizen.

(6)Subsection (5) applies to—
(a)Crown service under the government of a [F41British overseas territory]; and
(b)paid or unpaid service (not falling within paragraph (a)) as a member of any body established by law in a [F41British overseas territory] members of which are appointed by or on behalf of the Crown.
